arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola calls for major FA Cup change ahead of Man City vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola wants to see changes made to the FA Cup semi-final set-up moving forward ahead of the champions' latest trip to Wembley this weekend

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs. Man City: Pep Guardiola's side bidding to make English football history in FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking to make English football history when they lock horns with Nottingham Forest in the FA Cup semi-finals at Wembley Stadium on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola knows Nottingham Forest provide stern test for Manchester City
arts.sum: City face Forest in Sunday’s second FA Cup semi-final at Wembley.

arts.ttl: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: Pep Guardiola's full-back dilemma could open door for Nottingham Forest to spring FA Cup semi-final shock
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: Nuno may look to pack the midfield again if Pep Guardiola uses full backs Nico O'Reilly and Matheus Nunes as he did in City's recent win over Everton.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs. Man City: "Fear factor" returning to Pep Guardiola's side as FA Cup semi-final prediction is made
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole that the "fear factor" is returning to Pep Guardiola's side and explains why he is confident they will prevail against Nottingham Forest in Sunday's FA Cup semi-final.

arts.ttl: Man City XI vs Nottingham Forest: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola offers positive updates on Rodri and Erling Haaland amid Ederson question for Wembley

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Man City: FA Cup prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: A place in the FA Cup final is at stake
